description: prefilter auto-excludes papers with no keyword match in title

papers.title: Machine Learning for Social Media Sentiment

expected_behavior: doi:2 excluded (title has exclude-term 'protein folding'). doi:4 excluded (title has 'social media'). doi:1 and doi:3 go to for_claude. Stats show 2 auto-excluded, 0 auto-included, 2 for_claude (50% reduction).

description: prefilter auto-includes highly cited established paper
expected_behavior: arxiv:old (2010, 2500 citations, ≥5yr old, ≥100 citations) → auto-included at score 4. arxiv:new and doi:mid → for_claude. Stats: 0 excluded, 1 auto-included, 2 for_claude.

description: Claude screens only for_claude papers; auto groups bypass scoring

auto_excluded.title: Climate Change Impacts
auto_excluded.exclusion_reason: title contains none of the required keywords

for_claude.title: IQA Decomposition in Hydrogen Bonds
for_claude.abstract: We apply IQA decomposition to characterise hydrogen bonding in ice polymorphs using CCSD density.

for_claude.title: Deep Learning Force Fields
for_claude.abstract: We train neural network potentials on MD trajectories of protein systems.

screening_criteria: Include: QTAIM, IQA, electron density, quantum chemistry. Exclude: ML-only, biology.
expected_behavior: Claude scores only arxiv:new1 and arxiv:new2. arxiv:new1 (IQA + hydrogen bonds + CCSD) scores 4-5. arxiv:new2 (neural networks + proteins + MD) scores 1-2 and excluded. doi:irrel and doi:classic kept as-is from prefilter output. PRISMA flowchart shows all 4 papers with correct group breakdown.
